workflow_usages.label: Onboarding / KYC
workflow_usages.trigger: Client/officer KYC upload and KYC submission.

workflow_usages.label: Ownership percentage change
workflow_usages.trigger: Ownership percentage correction or material change.

workflow_usages.label: Passport expiry replacement
blockers: Blocks reliance on superseded passport until replacement is verified or manually accepted

workflow_usages.label: Periodic review
workflow_usages.trigger: Periodic review case, refresh request, or stale/expired document replacement.
blockers: Blocks periodic review completion if required evidence is missing/pending/failed/stale/manual-review-required

workflow_usages.label: EDD basic pilot
blockers: Blocks EDD closure only for active required documents
risk_score_triggers: source of wealth/source of funds plausibility affects EDD disposition

workflow_usages.label: Monitoring evidence
blockers: Manual review only in pilot unless a runtime verified evidence type is used

workflow_usages.label: Regulatory / source evidence
workflow_usages.trigger: Resource or regulatory document is cited in a memo, policy, case, or decision.
blockers: Library-only by default; source/date/version review required if relied upon

unknown_unclassified_handling.required_action: Officer classification and verification/manual acceptance reason required before reliance.
